scope: Long-term product, ingest, admin, parser, publishing, and infrastructure roadmap

items.title: Freeze hybrid ingest direction
items.notes: Deterministic extraction is canonical; AI is suggestion-only.

items.title: Freeze JSON-first entity graph direction
items.notes: SQLite migration deferred until later scale pressure.

items.title: Create long-term planning docs and initial admin ingest backlog
Add milestone acceptance criteria for each implementation tranche
Add deployment policy describing what stays local/admin-only vs public
Create first-pass entity and review schemas
Bootstrap case, org, person, document, message, review_task, and ingest_batch entities
Expand top-level entity model beyond cases to investigations, initiatives, plans, contacts, issues, and tasks
Add formal event entity persistence and event edge graph
Add alias and merge workflow for person and organization entities
Add richer sourceRef, provenance span, and field-level provenance schema
Store current field value plus field history log plus periodic snapshots for important fields
Add schema version migration rules and compatibility checks

tracks.title: People, Contacts, Roles, and Knowledge Graph

items.title: Build comprehensive person profiles with roles, history, known contacts, and linked organizations

Track role authority and reporting/governance links

tracks.title: Hosting, MariaDB, and Secure Platform Migration

items.title: Define staged migration from JSON-backed local admin to cPanel/PHP/MariaDB production architecture
Map current JSON entities, edges, notes, redaction jobs, DESE enrichment, and review history into MariaDB tables
Design secure admin authentication using hashed passwords, session tables, CSRF protection, and role-based access
Define private API endpoints for review actions, notes, redaction jobs, entity linking, and DESE enrichment refreshes
Plan secure separation between public site assets and internal admin data on shared hosting
Define migration/export-import tooling from JSON into MariaDB with repeatable idempotent scripts
Add audit trail, login history, and approval/change logging for all admin actions
Plan secret handling for cPanel PHP environment and MariaDB credentials without exposing them to public web root
Design staged rollout: local-only admin -> password-protected hosted admin -> role-based secure system
Review cPanel shared-hosting limits and identify when a VPS or external worker becomes necessary for OCR/jobs
Add ingest artifacts to QA checks
Add schema validation against explicit schema files
Add duplicate entity and duplicate document checks
Add metadata red-flag regression tests
Add parser fixture library and expected-output regression tests
Add rule-engine regression tests for doc families and situations
Add deployment diff report comparing local public build vs live site
Prepare SQLite migration path from JSON entities and edges
Add richer people/org role history and alias management
Add advanced graph analytics and duplicate merge tooling
Add background worker or service process for long OCR and extraction jobs
